gpt55_review_summary: Dalton the 3rd approved the final patch, including the Databricks summary-array validator/docs/tests and pr-evidence/validate-databricks-submit-summary-arrays files.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_databricks_runs.py tests/test_release_bundle.py tests/test_project_governance.py -q
poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests
what_changed: Required Databricks run-status submit_payload summary arrays to match values summarized from submit_payload.tasks.
Documented the summary-array integrity requirement in the release-bundle README contract.
why: Release bundles carry compact Databricks sidecars, so generated summary metadata must stay tied to the task-level payload evidence it summarizes.
